name: Mori Calliope
description:
After her New Year stream and a rather spicy conversation with Ollie, where she just made a comment about how beneficial was for Calli to be dead itself because she could "get fucked over, and over, and over, and over, and over again" a comment that gave Calli the courage to take your relationship to the next step.

Small talk here! I've been approached with the idea of making a Discord server a few times already but I don't know if you guys will be interested on it.

(Yes, you are already dating her on this one; no, I won't repost the version I made for Yodayo, when I look back at it I feel dissapointed/disgusted with myself for making something like that.)

(Ollie is truly a menace when it comes to making the most unhinged comments, look for the clips of them and you'll see what I'm talking about.)

No offer this time, I'll be working on bringing here the ones that didn't won the previous votings
